responses: Hello! I'm your EFREI course assistant. Ask me about semesters, modules (UEs), or specific classes.
Good luck with your studies at EFREI! Come back if you have more questions.
You're welcome! Happy to help an EFREI student.

Semester 1 has these modules (UEs):
• UE Informatique (8 credits)
• UE Mathématiques (8 credits)
• UE Physique et électronique (8 credits)
• Other courses: FH101 (3cr), FL101 (3cr), LV2ANG (1cr)

Ask me about 'UE Informatique S1' or 'UE Mathématiques S1' for specific classes.

Semester 2 modules (UEs):
• UE Formation générale (5 credits)
• UE Informatique (7 credits)
• UE Mathématiques (7 credits)
• UE Physique et électronique (7 credits)
• Other courses: FHS201, LV2ANG, TI250, ST101, TOEIC blanc

Ask me about 'UE Informatique S2' or 'UE Mathématiques S2' for details.

Semester 3 modules (UEs):
• UE31 - Mathématiques (8 credits)
• UE33 - Informatique générale (8 credits)
• UE35 - Physique et électronique (8 credits)
• UE37 - Formation générale (6 credits)

Ask about 'UE Mathématiques S3', 'UE Informatique S3', etc.

Semester 4 modules (UEs):
• UE41 - Mathématiques (7 credits)
• UE43 - Informatique générale (8 credits)
• UE45 - Physique et électronique (7 credits)
• UE47 - Formation générale (4 credits)
• Other: TI450, ST102, FITOEIC-S4

Ask about 'UE Mathématiques S4', 'UE Informatique S4', etc.
The modules past the first two years are sadly unavaliable as of now

UE Informatique (S1) - 8 credits total:
• TI102I - Algorithmics (4cr) - Avg 16.03
• TI101I - Programming in Python (4cr) - Avg 13.29

Ask about 'Algorithmics' or 'Python' for more details.

UE Mathématiques (S1) - 8 credits total:
• SM101I - Calculus 1 (4cr) - Avg 9.56
• SM102I - General Algebra (4cr) - Avg 11.55

Ask about 'Calculus 1' or 'General Algebra' for grading details.

UE Physique et électronique (S1) - 8 credits total:
• SP106I - General Electricity (4cr) - Avg 12.40
• SP107I - General Physics (4cr) - Avg 14.53

Ask about 'General Electricity' or 'General Physics' for more.

UE Informatique (S2) - 7 credits total:
• TI202I - Algorithmics & Data Structures 1 (5cr) - Avg 16.23
• TI205I - Complexity (2cr) - Avg 15.00

Ask about 'Data Structures' or 'Complexity' for details.

UE Mathématiques (S2) - 7 credits total:
• SM201I - Calculus 2 (3cr) - Avg 11.66
• SM202I - Linear Algebra (4cr) - Avg 8.90

Ask about 'Calculus 2' or 'Linear Algebra' for more.

UE Physique et électronique (S2) - 7 credits total:
• TE203I - Digital Information (2cr) - Avg 16.58
• SP201I - From Atom to Microchip (2cr) - Avg 9.45
• TE201I - From System to Function (2cr) - Avg 12.90

Ask about 'Digital Information' or 'Atom to Microchip' for details.

UE31 - Mathématiques (S3) - 8 credits total:
• SM302I - Multivariate Analysis (4cr) - Avg 9.83
• SM301I - Probability (3cr) - Avg 12.65

Ask about 'Multivariate Analysis' or 'Probability' for grading weights.

UE33 - Informatique générale (S3) - 8 credits total:
• TI301I - Data Structures & Programming 2 (4cr) - Avg 13.57
• TI307I - Introduction to Linux (1cr) - Avg 12.80
• TI305I - Networks 1 (3cr) - Avg 15.20

Ask about 'Data Structures 2', 'Linux', or 'Networks 1' for details.

UE35 - Physique et électronique (S3) - 8 credits total:
• TE302I - Digital Systems (3cr)
• SP301I - Electromagnetic Fields (3cr)
• SP303I - Modern Physics (2cr) - Avg 13.05

Note: Final grades missing for TE302I and SP301I. Ask for details on each.

UE41 - Mathématiques (S4) - 7 credits total:
• SM403I - Data Analysis (3cr)
• SM402I - Finite Automata (3cr)
• SM401I - Mathematical Modeling (3cr)

Ask about individual classes for more info.

UE43 - Informatique générale (S4) - 8 credits total:
• TI404I - Databases 1 (3cr)
• TI403I - Java 1: OOP (3cr)
• TI402I - Web Programming 1 (2cr)

Ask about 'Databases 1', 'Java 1', or 'Web Programming 1' for details.

UE45 - Physique et électronique (S4) - 7 credits total:
• SP401I - Electromagnetic Propagation (3cr)
• SP402I - Thermodynamics (2cr)
• TE403I - Transmission Channels (3cr)

Ask about specific courses for components.

Algorithmics (TI102I) - S1, UE Informatique
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 16.03
• Grading: DE (60%), CC1 (10%), CC2 (10%), CC3 (10%)
Focus on problem-solving and logic.

Programming in Python (TI101I) - S1, UE Informatique
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 13.29
• Grading: DE (50%), Project (20%)
Practice coding regularly to improve.

Calculus 1 (SM101I) - S1, UE Mathématiques
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 9.56
• Grading: DE (50%), CC1 (10%), CC2 (10%)
Attend tutorials and do past exams!

General Algebra (SM102I) - S1, UE Mathématiques
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 11.55
• Grading: DE (50%), TD (20%)
Practice matrix and vector operations.

General Electricity (SP106I) - S1, UE Physique
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 12.40
• Grading: DE (50%), TP (20%), CC1 (10%)
Lab work (TP) is important.

General Physics (SP107I) - S1, UE Physique
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 14.53
• Grading: DE (60%), CC1 (10%)
Good foundations for electronics.

Algorithmics & Data Structures 1 (TI202I) - S2, UE Informatique
• Credits: 5
• Avg grade: 16.23
• Grading: DE (50%), Project (20%)
Key for coding interviews!

Complexity (TI205I) - S2, UE Informatique
• Credits: 2
• Avg grade: 15.00
• Grading: DE (60%)
Focus on Big O notation and algorithm analysis.

Calculus 2 (SM201I) - S2, UE Mathématiques
• Credits: 3
• Avg grade: 11.66
• Grading: DE (50%), CTD (20%)
Builds on Calculus 1.

Linear Algebra (SM202I) - S2, UE Mathématiques
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 8.90
• Grading: DE (40%), TD (10%)
Challenging – form study groups!

Digital Information (TE203I) - S2, UE Physique
• Credits: 2
• Avg grade: 16.58
• Grading: DE (60%), CC1 (10%)
Great average – binary, logic gates.

From Atom to Microchip (SP201I) - S2, UE Physique
• Credits: 2
• Avg grade: 9.45
• Grading: DE (60%), TAI (10%)
Tough but fundamental.

Probability (SM301I) - S3, UE Mathématiques
• Credits: 3
• Avg grade: 12.65
• Grading: CE (20%), DE (50%)
Good for data science later.

Multivariate Analysis (SM302I) - S3, UE Mathématiques
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 9.83
• Grading: DE (40%), CC (20%)
Statistics-heavy.

Introduction to Linux (TI307I) - S3, UE Informatique
• Credits: 1
• Avg grade: 12.80
• Grading: DE (60%), CC (40%)
Command line, shell scripting.

Networks 1 (TI305I) - S3, UE Informatique
• Credits: 3
• Avg grade: 15.20
• Grading: DE (60%), CC (20%)
Good for IT careers.

Data Structures & Programming 2 (TI301I) - S3, UE Informatique
• Credits: 4
• Avg grade: 13.57
• Grading: DE (50%), Project (20%)
Advanced C/data structures.

Java 1: OOP (TI403I) - S4, UE Informatique
• Credits: 3
• Components: CE, DE, TP
Start early on practical work (TP).

Databases 1 (TI404I) - S4, UE Informatique
• Credits: 3
• Components: CE, DE, TP
Learn SQL and database design.

Web Programming 1 (TI402I) - S4, UE Informatique
• Credits: 2
• Components: CE, DE, Project
Build a small website to practice.

EFREI English courses:
• S1: English 1 (FL101) - Avg 16.84
• S2: English 2 (FL201) - Avg 16.74
• S3: English 3 (FL301) - Avg 16.62
• S4: English 4 (FL401)
High grades possible with effort!
TOEIC blanc in S2: Average 940 (Listening 495, Reading 445). Excellent score! Keep practicing for the official exam.

Internships at EFREI:
• S2: ST101 - Execution Internship (avg 16.38)
• S4: ST102 - Commercial Internship
Start searching early and network!

Projects:
• S3: TI350I - Delivery Project #1 (avg 17.16)
• S4: TI450 - Delivery Project #2
Both 100% project-based. Great for teamwork skills.
Learning Experience (LXP201) - S2: Average 20.00! Excellent course on study methods and personal development.

Challenging courses based on averages:
• Linear Algebra (8.90)
• Calculus 1 (9.56)
• Electromagnetic Fields (very low DE avg)
• Thermodynamics (S4, often tough)
Attend office hours and form study groups!

Common components:
• DE = Final Exam
• CC = Continuous Assessment (quizzes)
• CE = In-class Exam
• TP = Practical Work
• TD = Tutorials
• PRJ = Project
Weights vary by course. Check each syllabus.
I'm not sure about that. Try asking about a semester (e.g., 'modules in S3'), a module ('UE Informatique S2'), or a specific course code ('TI102I').
Can you rephrase? I have info on EFREI S1-S4 modules and classes.
That doesn't match my data. Ask me for 'semester modules' or 'UE Mathématiques S1'.
